title: Duisburg, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Duisburg, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Duisburg is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 498,000. The largest inland port in Europe, a city of industrial heritage reinventing itself with green tech, culture, and affordable living.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
